_note: RE CAPTURE - find the death/status flag offset (docs/modding/07 Test 1b, next-gate step 2). Observe-only: NO HP rewrite, so vanilla kills units normally. Run with NO data neuter deployed (units must be able to die). When any unit is observed at 0 HP, the mod logs [DEATH-DUMP] (full struct), [DEATH-DIFF] (alive->dead byte changes) and [DEATH-FOLLOW] (changes over the next ~1.5s, to catch a delayed flag set). Read the log and look for changed offsets OTHER than 0x30/0x31 (HP). A byte/bit that flips exactly when a unit dies is the death/status field. Then put it in DeathStateWrites (see death-test profile) to cause death ourselves.
